title: Fix IIT-Time Test Data Isolation
description:
The IIT-Time tests in tests/iit-time.test.ts are failing due to data isolation issues. The beforeEach/afterEach cleanup of the test directory isn't preventing real measurement files from interfering with test assertions. Need to either:

1. Mock the filesystem operations for tests
2. Use a unique test directory per test  
3. Ensure real data files don't interfere with test assertions
4. Or make the test assertions more resilient to existing data

8 failing tests:
- should create default measurement file structure
- should update metadata on recording
- should calculate trend direction
- should retrieve session measurements
- should detect spike anomalies
- should detect drop anomalies
- should generate CSV export

Code was already fixed in src/tools/plugins/creative-workshop.ts, src/tools/pii-dataset.test.ts, and tests/iit-time.test.ts (imports). Completion of test fixes is the remaining work.
